story.artifact_power: The crystal Doctor Krit needs for his mind-control machine.
story.greeting: Romy, your island mission begins now — listen closely.
story.act1: Evil Doctor Krit is hunting the magical crystals from this island to power up his mind-control machine. He has awakened and taken control of the mind of an ancient crystal monkey golem. Romy, we need to reach the focusing crystal first and free the monkey golem from Doctor Krit's control.
story.act2: The mischievous Crystal Monkey Golem, hands glimmering like gemstones, juggles precious crystals, dropping them into tricky puzzles that split and scatter the island's magic.
story.act3: Romy, it's up to you to solve these puzzles and claim the powerful Focusing Crystal. With it, you can unlock the hidden secrets of the island!
story.goal: Romy, master every math trial, reach the island's core in time, and break Doctor Krit's hold.

theory.title: Crystal Code: Halves, Thirds and Quarters

rule.text: Split a whole into EQUAL parts: 2 parts are halves (1/2), 3 are thirds (1/3), 4 are quarters (1/4).

stages.title: Doctor Krit shuffled two crystal slices — order them smallest first.
stages.mechanic_reason: At difficulty 5, ordering smaller fractions adds complexity for age 9.
stages.success_message: Great job ordering those slices, Romy!

rounds.title: Doctor Krit shuffled two crystal slices — order them smallest first.
rounds.stage_essence: Order the crystal slices, smallest first

rounds.title: The golem drops three slices into the tunnel — smallest piece first.
rounds.stage_essence: Order the crystal slices, smallest first

rounds.title: Four slices glow inside the geode — line them up from the smallest.

stages.title: The golem guards a cut geode — name one piece.
stages.mechanic_reason: Multi-choice lets Romy think critically about correct fraction naming at level 5.
stages.success_message: Correct choice, Romy! You're a fraction master.

stages.title: Doctor Krit cracks a crystal into two uneven bits.

rounds.statement: One third means one of 3 equal parts.

rounds.statement: A half is bigger than a quarter of the same crystal.
rounds.title: Two pieces of the same crystal — one big, one small.

stages.title: Split 8 crystals in half to power the lamp.
stages.mechanic_reason: Fill_blank helps Romy solidify fraction basics through direct calculation.

rounds.title: Split 8 crystals in half to power the lamp.

One third of the pile feeds the sleeping golem.
Halve the last 14 crystals before the tunnel closes.

stages.title: Two glowing corridors — take the bigger piece.

artifact.name: Focusing Crystal
artifact.description: Reveals hidden paths and secret codes.

tutor_notes.block1_script: Introduce Romy to fractions using visual aids and hands-on gameplay.
tutor_notes.block2_hint: Encourage Romy to think of fractions as splitting delicious pies or cakes.
block3_tips: Reassure Romy that it's okay to make mistakes along the way.
Use concrete examples to demonstrate halves, thirds, and quarters.
tutor_notes.block5_abstraction: Gradually move from concrete examples to more abstract representations of fractions.
tutor_notes.weak_point_focus: Focus on understanding the concept of equal parts and the naming of fractions.
